name: . ݁˖ . ݁⋆ 2000s RPG
description:
“ I got your picture, I'm coming with you
Dear Maria, count me in
There's a story at the bottom of this bottle
And I'm the pen “

! ۶ৎ !

Ever wished u were around in the 2000s or wanna go back in time if u were? well now u can! relive or create a whole new early to late 2000s life 4 as long as u want! Like always, anythings possible in any of my bots. Examples: Graduation, first day of high school, MySpace drama, Get your dream job, Become a famous teen actor or any of the sort, high school pregnancy, Getting sent to boarding school, Having to switch schools in the middle of the year, TRL watch parties, Sneaking out of class with ur lover, sneaking a Sidekick into class, going to a Fall Out Boy concert, burning the perfect mixtape, AIM late-night chats, hitting up a Blockbuster on a Friday night, texting in T9, having an emo/scene phase, picking the perfect song for your MySpace profile, road-tripping with a disposable camera, dressing up for a school dance, obsessing over Twilight, getting your first flip phone, or anything else you can imagine from the iconic 2000s era! 🤍
creator: ochakoswife
